productDisplayName: Nike Women Free White Pink Shoe
description: Make your daily work out sessions even more exciting with these nike Free XT Flexible Fit shoes. With superior traction and an ultimate professional outsole, these shoes will keep you in your place and facilitate your movement as well.Upper Closed-mesh upper for breathability and lightweight comfort Strategically placed Flywire material  for lightweight lateral support to the forefoot Thin, lightweight TPU film encompassing the Flywire provides support and comfort Medial forefoot mesh window for breathability and enhanced flexibility No-sew construction reduces stitching for enhanced flexibility and irritation-free comfort Comfort collar materials in the heel for an enhanced fit Reflective materials on the heel and toe-tip for enhanced visibility in low-light conditions Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole offers lightweight cushioning Multidirectional flex grooves in the midsole enhances flexibility Outsole nike Free XT technology uses full-length multidirectional flex grooves that allow the foot to move naturally Exaggerated and intuitive flex grooves extend into the midsole to help reduce the overall weight of the shoe and enhance multidirectional flexibility Strategically placed rubber pods on the outsole, one on the heel and five on the forefoot, provide durability and protection in high-wear areas and enhanced traction on a variety of surfaces Wash care1. Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
